languages.text: "Арбитес не тратят слова на прохожий сброд. Кроме того, он заслужил такие меры — при виде арбитра с кибермастифом он должен был немедленно сложить оружие и убрать руки за голову".

"The Adeptus Arbites does not waste words on passing rabble. And besides, my methods were warranted — at the sight of an Arbitrator with a cyber-mastiff, he should have immediately laid down his weapon and put his hands behind his head."
languages.original_text: "Арбитес не тратят слова на прохожий сброд. Кроме того, он заслужил такие меры — при виде арбитра с кибермастифом он должен был немедленно сложить оружие и убрать руки за голову".

"The Adeptus Arbites does not waste words on passing rabble. And besides, my methods were warranted — at the sight of an Arbitrator with a cyber-mastiff, he should have immediately laid down his weapon and put his hands behind his head."

languages.text: “法务官绝不会与随处可见的乌合之众浪费口舌。而且，我的做法合情合理。看到带着生化獒犬的法务官时，就该立刻放下武器，把双手放在脑后。”
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites does not waste words on passing rabble. And besides, my methods were warranted — at the sight of an Arbitrator with a cyber-mastiff, he should have immediately laid down his weapon and put his hands behind his head."

traits.locale_text: “法务官绝不会与随处可见的乌合之众浪费口舌。而且，我的做法合情合理。看到带着生化獒犬的法务官时，就该立刻放下武器，把双手放在脑后。”

languages.text: 「高等裁定局が、その場限りの下賤な連中に言葉を浪費することはありません。それに、私のやり方は正当なものです。アービトレイターがサイバーマスチフを連れて現れた時点で、彼はただちに武器を捨て、頭の後ろで手を組むべきだったのです」
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites does not waste words on passing rabble. And besides, my methods were warranted — at the sight of an Arbitrator with a cyber-mastiff, he should have immediately laid down his weapon and put his hands behind his head."

traits.locale_text: 「高等裁定局が、その場限りの下賤な連中に言葉を浪費することはありません。それに、私のやり方は正当なものです。アービトレイターがサイバーマスチフを連れて現れた時点で、彼はただちに武器を捨て、頭の後ろで手を組むべきだったのです」

languages.text: «El Adeptus Arbites no malgasta saliva con la vulgar chusma. Además, mis métodos estaban justificados: nada más ver a un Arbitrator con un cibermastín, debió deponer el arma inmediatamente y llevarse las manos a la nuca».
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites does not waste words on passing rabble. And besides, my methods were warranted — at the sight of an Arbitrator with a cyber-mastiff, he should have immediately laid down his weapon and put his hands behind his head."

traits.locale_text: «El Adeptus Arbites no malgasta saliva con la vulgar chusma. Además, mis métodos estaban justificados: nada más ver a un Arbitrator con un cibermastín, debió deponer el arma inmediatamente y llevarse las manos a la nuca».

languages.text: "Adeptus Arbites, ayaktakımına laf yetiştirmekle uğraşmaz. Ayrıca yöntemlerimin etkinliği kanıtlanmış zaten. Siber mastifli bir Yargıcı görür görmez silahını atıp ellerini başının arkasına alması lazımdı."
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites does not waste words on passing rabble. And besides, my methods were warranted — at the sight of an Arbitrator with a cyber-mastiff, he should have immediately laid down his weapon and put his hands behind his head."

traits.locale_text: "Adeptus Arbites, ayaktakımına laf yetiştirmekle uğraşmaz. Ayrıca yöntemlerimin etkinliği kanıtlanmış zaten. Siber mastifli bir Yargıcı görür görmez silahını atıp ellerini başının arkasına alması lazımdı."

languages.text: « L'Adeptus Arbites ne perd pas son temps avec la populace. En outre, mes méthodes étaient justifiées. Il aurait dû déposer ses armes et mettre ses mains derrière la tête à la seule vue d'un arbitrator accompagné d'un cyber-mastiff. »
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites does not waste words on passing rabble. And besides, my methods were warranted — at the sight of an Arbitrator with a cyber-mastiff, he should have immediately laid down his weapon and put his hands behind his head."

traits.locale_text: « L'Adeptus Arbites ne perd pas son temps avec la populace. En outre, mes méthodes étaient justifiées. Il aurait dû déposer ses armes et mettre ses mains derrière la tête à la seule vue d'un arbitrator accompagné d'un cyber-mastiff. »

languages.text: "Der Adeptus Arbites vergeudet keine Worte für nichtswürdiges Gesindel. Und außerdem waren meine Methoden gerechtfertigt – beim Anblick eines Arbitrators mit einem Cyber-Mastiff hätte er umgehend seine Waffe senken und die Hände hinter dem Kopf verschränken müssen."
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites does not waste words on passing rabble. And besides, my methods were warranted — at the sight of an Arbitrator with a cyber-mastiff, he should have immediately laid down his weapon and put his hands behind his head."

traits.locale_text: "Der Adeptus Arbites vergeudet keine Worte für nichtswürdiges Gesindel. Und außerdem waren meine Methoden gerechtfertigt – beim Anblick eines Arbitrators mit einem Cyber-Mastiff hätte er umgehend seine Waffe senken und die Hände hinter dem Kopf verschränken müssen."
